narrative:
Williamsburg Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 574 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
